concerns.text: FR-010/SC-006 (ambiguous classification handling) is documented in research.md but lacks explicit implementation task in plan.md code structure. validator.py should include this logic but plan prose doesn't specify.

FR-011/SC-007 (tie-breaking validation script) is mentioned in research.md but no specific validation script file is named in plan.md structure. data/reproducibility/validation_scripts/ exists but SC-007 requires a specific tie-breaking validation script.

FR-013/SC-014 (KnotInfo data consistency cross-check) is documented in research.md but lacks dedicated implementation module or quickstart step. No code/analysis/knotinfo_crosscheck.py or equivalent quickstart step for this validation.
